personas.name: Satisfied Self-Tracker
personas.description: A user who values self-awareness and emotional tracking, seeking a straightforward and private experience.
goals: Monitor and understand their emotional state
Use a simple and effective app for self-tracking
Have a private space for self-expression
context: Potential use in professional settings (e.g., with doctors)
constraints: May be deterred by subscription models
Values ease of use and straightforward features

personas.name: Mindful Tracker
personas.description: A user seeking to monitor and understand their mental health and mood patterns.
goals: Track daily mood and emotional state
Gain clarity on mental health patterns
Reflect on emotional state and changes
pain_points: Difficulty in recognizing and understanding mood patterns
Need for a tool to monitor emotional state
context: Possibly living with a mental health condition (e.g., BPD)
constraints: Seeking a user-friendly and gentle tracking experience

personas.name: Emotional Tracker
personas.description: A user seeking to understand and manage their emotions effectively
goals: Track and understand my emotions effectively
Identify patterns of behavior and feelings
Manage depressive episodes and improve mental well-being
pain_points: Need for effective emotional tracking and reflection tools
context: Daily life, managing emotions and mental health
During depressive episodes, looking for tools to track and reflect on emotions
constraints: Needs a user-friendly and effective emotional tracking tool
Seeks to improve mental well-being and manage emotions

personas.name: Frustrated Mental Health Tracker
personas.description: A long-time user of the app who values its insights for managing mental health but faces limitations and frustrations with its subscription model.
goals: Effectively track and manage mental health
Gain valuable insights for therapy discussions
Access helpful features without unnecessary constraints
pain_points: Limited access to results behind a paywall
context: Long-term user of the app (some have used it for over a year or two)
Values the app for its insights and tracking capabilities
May be considering therapy or actively engaged in mental health management
constraints: Frustrated with the app's monetization strategy
Seeks a more user-friendly and considerate experience

personas.name: Curious Mental Health Tracker
personas.description: A person interested in tracking their mental health and mood, looking for an app that provides thought-provoking questions and is easy to use.
goals: Reflect on current situation and personality
Use an app that provides interesting and thought-provoking questions
pain_points: Limited emotional options in daily mood tracking
Unclear purpose or benefits of the app at first
context: Uses mental health apps to track mood and discuss with therapist
Values ease of use and simple structure in apps
Interested in reflecting on mental health and personality
constraints: May have limited experience with mental health apps
May be unsure about the benefits of the app at first
